zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah H Jackson於1710年2月27日出生在英國越可爾布利德林頓時，她的父親Marmaduke Jackson31歲，母親ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson36歲。她於1728年1月24日與Giles Chapman Jr.在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1710年住在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。她去世於1790年3月20日在美國南卡羅來納州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾素爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah H Jackson于1710年2月27日出生在英国越可爾布利德林頓时，她的父亲Marmaduke Jackson31岁，母亲ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson36岁。她于1728年1月24日与Giles Chapman Jr.在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1710年住在英国英格兰越可爾約克。她去世于1790年3月20日在美国南卡罗来纳州紐貝利紐貝利普洛斯利特享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾素爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

historicEvents.title: The Shot Heard Around the World
historicEvents.description: "On April 18, 1775, a shot known as the ""shot heard around the world"" was fired between American colonists and British troops in Lexington, Massachusetts. This began the American War for Independence. Fifteen months later, Thomas Jefferson penned the Declaration of Independence. The Treaty of Paris was signed in September 1783 which ended the war. The colonies were no longer under British rule. Many who fought for the British fled to Canada, the West Indies, and some to England."
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah H Jackson was born on 27 February 1710, in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, her father, Marmaduke Jackson, was 31 and her mother, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, was 36. She married Giles Chapman Jr. on 24 January 1728, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1710. She died on 20 March 1790, in Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, South Carolina, United States, at the age of 80, and was buried in Southill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah H Jackson est née le 27 février 1710, à Bridlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Marmaduke Jackson, avait 31 ans et sa mère, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Giles Chapman Jr. le 24 janvier 1728, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1710. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1790, à Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Caroline du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Southill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah H Jackson am 27. Februar 1710 in Bridlington, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Marmaduke Jackson 31 und ihre Mutter ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson 36. Sie hat am 24. Januar 1728 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Giles Chapman Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1710 hat sie in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 20. it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah H Jackson è nata il il 27 febbraio 1710 nel Bridlington, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Marmaduke Jackson, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Giles Chapman Jr. il 24 gennaio 1728, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1710. Morì il 20 marzo 1790, nel Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sud, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Southill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah H Jacksonが1710年2月27日にイギリスヨークシュアイアブリドリントンで生まれた時，父Marmaduke Jacksonは31歳，母ElizabethVan Winkle Andersonは36歳であった。1728年1月24日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでGiles Chapman Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1710年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークに住んでいた。彼女は1790年3月20日にアメリカ合衆国サウスカロライナ州ニューバーリーニューバーリープロスペリトイで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアソウスイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah H Jackson(이)가 1710년 2월 27일 영국 요르크실르 브리들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Marmaduke Jackson(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1728년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Giles Chapman Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1710년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1790년 3월 20일 미국 사우스캐롤라이나 주 뉴베리 뉴베리 플로스페리티에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 소우스이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah H Jackson nasceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1710, em Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marmaduke Jackson, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Giles Chapman Jr. em 24 de janeiro de 1728, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1710. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1790, em Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Southill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah H Jackson родилась 27 февраля 1710 г. в местности бридлингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Marmaduke Jackson было 31 год, а матери, которую звали ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Giles Chapman Jr. 24 января 1728 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1710 году. Она умерла 20 марта 1790 г. в местности проспирити, нюбирри, нюбирри, Южная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности соутилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah H Jackson nació el 27 de febrero de 1710, en Bridlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Marmaduke Jackson, tenía 31 años y su mamá, ElizabethVan Winkle Anderson, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Giles Chapman Jr. el 24 de enero de 1728, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1710. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1790, en Prosperity, Newberry, Newberry, Carolina del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Southill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
